the_signal.headline: Large context windows are a reliability trap — verify before deploying
the_signal.body: The 'Don't trust large context windows' post exposes a critical GTM risk: RAG systems and agentic revenue tools bleeding accuracy at scale because engineers assume bigger context = better performance. This directly impacts conversion workflows where hallucinations cost revenue, not just API bills. You need validation gates before shipping context-heavy prompts to production.

tool_drop.name: n8n OpenTelemetry Native Support
tool_drop.what: Native OpenTelemetry tracing for every workflow and node execution, emitting traces to your existing observability stack.
tool_drop.why: GTM engineers can now instrument revenue automation end-to-end without building custom logging — critical for debugging multi-agent revenue workflows without adding latency to customer-facing systems.

thread_of_day.title: Complex Agent Patterns: From proof-of-concept to production debugging
thread_of_day.takeaway: Multi-agent revenue systems fail not at scale but at composition — sub-workflow memory management and inter-agent state becomes the bottleneck before cost guardrails do.

quote.text: Your first AI agent worked great. Then you added three more and the system became impossible to debug.

whats_moving.context: Compliance is no longer a post-deployment concern — n8n's governance tools post signals that GTM stacks need compliance-first architecture for regulated industries and SOC 2 deals.

The Hacker News conversation on large context windows reveals that 100K+ token contexts are shipping broken — revenue systems relying on long-context RAG need validation testing before customer handoff.
n8n's integration patterns post drops as GTM teams scale automation — choosing between event-driven, polling, and webhook patterns now impacts both revenue latency and operational debugging costs.

act_on_this: Run a context window stress test on your top 3 revenue workflows — benchmark accuracy, latency, and hallucination rates at 25%, 50%, 75%, and 100% of your max context window before next quarter's expansion.

numbers.stat: n8n targeting 200-person UK team by 2029, tripling UK headcount in past year
numbers.context: Workflow orchestration is becoming a core GTM infrastructure layer — the investment velocity signals that enterprise revenue automation is consolidating around purpose-built platforms rather than custom integrations.
